question: What day of the week did I meet with my previous language exchange tutor Juan?

retrieval_results.context:
User has a language exchange session with tutor Maria on Thursday, following a prior session with tutor Juan on Wednesday evening.
User has a language exchange class with Juan, a Colombian tutor at a local language school, meeting every Wednesday evening; Juan helps the user with Spanish pronunciation and grammar, while the user assists him with English vocabulary.
User is planning their weekly schedule, including a trip to Colombia, a language exchange session with Maria on Thursday, and a prior session with Juan on Wednesday evening.
The user had previously been unsure of the day but now confirms it is Wednesday evening.

User wants to visit Plaza de Bolívar after the Gold Museum, wants to know its significance and what to expect to see there.

User is planning a trip to Colombia and wants travel tips and Spanish phrases.
User intends to grab a snack at a cafe around Plaza de Bolívar before exploring surrounding streets, and wants to know other nearby attractions or landmarks that they shouldn't miss.
